data.description: Green Fire Opal & Moss Agate Leaf Couples Set—customizable and elegant, these nature-inspired matching rings are perfect for as bond, promise, or wedding rings!

    Celebrate your love with this exquisite His and Hers wedding band set, meticulously crafted to symbolize your unique bond.

    ►Her Ring:
    *This enchanting ring set features a stunning moss agate center stone, surrounded by delicate emerald leaf side stones, all beautifully set in luxurious 14K rose gold vermeil. The rich hues of the moss agate and the vibrant green of the emerald leaves create a harmonious blend of natural elegance and timeless beauty.
    *Her ring is 925 solid sterling silver with 14k rose gold finish.

    *Green Moss Agate is a gemstone known for its enchanting moss-like inclusions that resemble the natural patterns found in moss or foliage. These inclusions give each stone a unique and organic appearance, making it a perfect choice for a one-of-a-kind ring. The green color of Moss Agate adds a refreshing and earthy touch to the rings, symbolizing growth, renewal, and nature.

    *Band Width: 1.7mm (approx.)

    *Please note that rose gold vermeil plating will naturally fade over time with regular wear. If this is a concern, we recommend choosing our sterling silver or solid gold jewelry options.

    *Please note that the book box is not included; it is shown for style inspiration purposes only. The ring will be delivered in a luxurious velvet ring box.

    Center Stone: Agate
    Color (type): Green Moss
    Stone Creation: Natural
    Cut: Oval
    Gem size: 6.0 x 8.0 mm
    Average carat weight: 1.4 ct. (approx.)
    Accented with simulated emeralds & diamonds (cz)

    ►His Ring:
    *The matching men's band is a robust yet refined piece, crafted from two-tone tungsten carbide. This durable ring showcases a mesmerizing green fire opal inlay, accentuated by intricate rose gold leaf details. The combination of tungsten carbide's strength and the opal's fiery brilliance makes this ring a perfect symbol of enduring love and passion.

    *Metal type: two-tone tungsten carbide with crushed green fire opal and rose gold inlay.

    *Band Width: 8mm

    ►Together, this Green Fire Opal & Moss Agate Leaf Couples Ring Set is a perfect reflection of your shared journey, blending natural beauty with elegant design.

    ►Sold as a three-piece set.

    ►Each ring can be also purchased separately.

    ✨ Processing Time

    • Silver, Vermeil, Tungsten & Engraved Items: 1–4 business days
    • Made-to-Order Solid Gold & Platinum Jewelry: 2–5 weeks, depending on the design

    🚚 U.S. Delivery Estimates

    • USPS Ground Advantage: 3–12 business days
    • UPS Ground: 3–7 business days
    • UPS 3 Day Select: 3 business days
    • UPS 2nd Day Air: 2 business days
    • UPS Next Day Air Saver: 1 business day

    Delivery times begin once your order has shipped and may vary due to carrier delays. Upgraded shipping is prioritized. Shipping fees are non-refundable.

    🌍 International Shipping & Customs

    We ship worldwide. Delivery times vary by destination and method selected at checkout.
    For many countries, duties and taxes can be prepaid at checkout for a smoother delivery — if prepaid, no additional fees will be due upon arrival.

    Customs fees are determined by your country and are non-refundable once the order has shipped.

    The number of characters (including spaces) that can be engraved depends on the size and design of the piece. At Aquamarise®, the standard character limit is:

    • Women’s rings: 16 characters
    • Men’s rings: 25 characters

    FONT

    All standard engravings are completed in Arial font, selected for its clarity, precision, and timeless appearance.

    CUSTOM FONTS & SYMBOLS

    Standard engraving includes our Arial font along with the following symbols at no additional cost:
    ♥ ♡ ☾ ✩ ★ ✿ ♬ ♯ • ■

    If you would like a custom font or a symbol outside of this selection, this is available upon request for an additional fee.

    For custom symbols, logos, or unique designs, please email your file in SVG format prior to placing your order. Our team will review your request to ensure it can be engraved to the highest standard.

    Please note that intricate or highly detailed designs may not be suitable for very narrow or delicate bands. We will confirm compatibility with your specific ring before proceeding.

    HOW TO ORDER

    • Select your ring and add it to your cart
    • Choose the “Engraving” option during customization
    • Enter your engraving text in the personalization box
    • For custom fonts or symbols ($25), please contact us before ordering
    • Review your details carefully and complete checkout

    What Makes Aquamarise® Different

    Distinctly Yours, Perfectly Paired

    Aquamarise® couples rings are designed to connect without conforming. Each set is crafted to complement both wearers, whatever your style, aesthetic, or metal preference.

    Made to Be Worn Together

    From tungsten carbide to sterling silver, each set is crafted from carefully selected materials, chosen for comfort, strength, and everyday elegance.

    A Set That Tells Your Story

    Add a personal engraving and make it yours. Every Aquamarise® couples set ships in luxury gift packaging, ready to give or keep.

    Beyond Appearance. Crafted to Be Shared.

    While many jewelers focus on appearance, Aquamarise® is defined by refined craftsmanship and thoughtfully designed pieces meant to be shared.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Yes, every listing includes both rings as a matched set. Use the size selectors on the product page to choose each size independently. Need help finding your size? Visit our Ring Size Guide.

    Yes, Aquamarise® offers optional engraving at checkout. It is a simple way to add a date, initials, or a short phrase that means something to both of you. See our Engraving page for details.

    Couples' rings at Aquamarise® are available in sterling silver, tungsten carbide, gold vermeil, black ruthenium, titanium, and more. For guidance on choosing a metal, visit our Precious Metal Guide.

    Yes, every Aquamarise® piece comes with a craftsmanship warranty. Visit our Warranty page for details.

    Yes, you can return or exchange a couple's ring set within 14 days of delivery for unworn items in original condition. Engraved sets are final sale. Visit our Returns & Refunds page to get started.

    Free standard shipping is included on all US orders. International shipping is available worldwide, with rates calculated at checkout. See our Shipping Policy for delivery timeframes and more details.
